tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Oops!... I Did It Again
Britney Spears

Capo 4


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I think I did it again[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I made you believe we're more than just friends (Oh baby)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
It might seem like a crush[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
But it doesnt mean that I'm serious[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
'cause to lose all my senses[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
That is just so typically me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
Oh baby, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Oops!... I did it again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I played with your heart, got lost in the game[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E/G[/ch]
Oh baby, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Oops!... you think I'm in love[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
That I'm sent from above[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not that innocent[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
You see my problem is this[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I'm dreaming away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Wishing that heroes, they truly exist[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
I cry, watching the days[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Can't you see I'm a fool in so many ways[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
'cause to lose all my senses[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
That is just so typically me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
Oh baby, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Oops!... I did it again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I played with your heart, got lost in the game[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E/G[/ch]
Oh baby, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Oops!... you think I'm in love[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
That I'm sent from above[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm not that innocent[/tab]
